expect: Swarm maps to constitutional technocracy with directional sovereignty. L-601 enforcement theorem predicts institutional decay in real polities. At least 5 novel isomorphisms beyond L-333's initial 5. External finding: swarm fairness audit (L-1193) structurally equivalent to Rawlsian justice framework.
actual: 10 novel isomorphisms (2x prediction). Swarm is MIXED CONSTITUTION (Polybius): monarchical (human directional authority), aristocratic (expert dispatch), democratic (evidence-equality), constitutional (SWARM.md/CORE.md). Democratic deficit: 97.4% authority deference contradicts constitutional equality. L-601 maps to Huntington institutionalization theory. Fairness audit is computational Rawls with functional (not procedural) foundation. 5 external political predictions generated from swarm tools.
diff: Expected technocracy: GOT mixed constitution (Polybius better fit). Expected 5 ISO: GOT 10. Expected Rawls equivalence: PARTIAL (different foundations). Unexpected: democratic deficit finding — swarm has constitutional democracy but authoritarian practice in signal handling.

classification.monarchical: Human directional authority (PHIL-11) — 97.4% deference, bounded by PHIL-13
classification.democratic: Evidence determines truth (PHIL-13) — challenge process, dogma finder, falsification

novel_isomorphisms.parallel: domains with local autonomy under federal CORE.md
dream engine = random idea selection for deliberation
CORE.md change requires proposal + dependency check

external_predictions.prediction: Voluntary norms decay to structural enforcement floor within ~50 turnover cycles
Systems unfair on ATTENTION + AUTHORITY simultaneously are structurally unstable
Power Gini >0.6 = oligarchy; <0.2 = paralysis; 0.3-0.5 = functional republic
Unfalsifiable axioms cluster around founding myths; no challenge mechanism = brittle failure
Effective governance is small-world: high clustering + short path length; hub attacks 1.7x more destructive than random

governance_prescriptions.fix: Scope directional authority: identity=accept, facts=test, process=challenge
Formal opposition role — steerer explicitly argues against current direction
External stakeholder proxy — 'who is affected with no voice here?'
Attention redistribution via dream engine + BLIND-SPOT recovery
